name: Backpacking Bars
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350. In a large bowl, mix the first five ingredients and 1/2 cup of packed brown sugar until just combined. Increase speed to medium and beat for an additional two minutes (the mixture may appear dry). Shape the dough into a ball, then spread it evenly into an 8" x 8" baking pan. In a small bowl, combine eggs and 1/4 cup of packed brown sugar; stir in almonds and coconut. Pour this mixture over the top of the dough. Bake for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan on a rack before cutting into 12 pieces.
